pi_items.source: Multiple iDempiere documentation searches found no explicit mention of 'C&W Construction' in GardenWorld demo data. Documentation confirms GardenWorld includes business partners but no comprehensive list available.

iDempiere GardenWorld documentation confirms the demo includes 'plants, fertilizer, lawn furniture and tools' but no specific product enumeration of 'Mulch 10#' was found. Mulch products are plausible given GardenWorld's garden-themed product catalog.

pi_items.verified_value: Fertilizer products with 50kg bags are confirmed in GardenWorld
pi_items.source: ADempiere documentation states: 'Garden World sells lawn fertilizer in 50 and 70kg bags, with expansion to a variety of formats (50 or 70 Kg bags, cubic yards), chemical specifications, and base compost options (chemical, manure, mushroom, peat).' https://adempiere.gitbook.io/docs/introduction/garden-world-demonstration-client

pi_items.verified_value: Standard Order (SOO) is a valid iDempiere sales order document type
pi_items.source: iDempiere wiki documents 'Standard Order' as a predefined sales order type (SOO) for credit sales transactions. It is used for business-to-business transactions with payment on credit terms. https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/Sales_Order_Types
Quantity specification in task requirements - cannot be verified against database without direct access to demo data
Quantity specification in task requirements - cannot be verified against database without direct access to demo data

privileged_info_summary: The task uses GardenWorld, the standard demo company that comes with iDempiere 12-release. GardenWorld is real demo data (not synthetic) maintained as part of iDempiere's official seed database. Verified facts: (1) Standard Order is a documented iDempiere sales order document type for credit sales; (2) GardenWorld demo database includes fertilizer products, specifically lawn fertilizer available in 50kg bags, consistent with 'Fertilizer #50'; (3) GardenWorld includes various garden-related products (plants, fertilizer, lawn furniture, tools) making mulch products plausible; (4) The task's setup scripts query the live database to verify customer and product existence before task execution. The specific customer name 'C&W Construction' and product 'Mulch 10#' could not be independently confirmed through available documentation but are consistent with GardenWorld's product catalog structure.
